Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const data=fs.readFileSync\(String.raw\\`C:\\Users\\lnejy\\.claude\\projects\\C--capstone-design-Nun-Gil-Eyedid\\c055a703-c1a3-4bd6-b2c1-743432061bcd.jsonl\\`,'utf8'\); const lines=data.split\('\\n'\); let last=''; for\(const l of lines\){try{const o=JSON.parse\(l\); if\(o.role==='assistant' && o.content\) last=typeof o.content==='string'?o.content.substring\(0,3000\):JSON.stringify\(o.content\).substring\(0,3000\); if\(o.role==='user' && o.content\) last='USER:'+\( typeof o.content==='string'?o.content.substring\(0,1000\):JSON.stringify\(o.content\).substring\(0,1000\)\);}catch\(e\){}} console.log\(last\);")
